context_of_use: Deterministic synthetic engineering evidence for algorithms whose declared scope is ECG R-peak event detection only.

acceptance_profile.description: Peak-detector-only acceptance limits. Signal-quality classification and RR/HRV measurements are outside this claim.
Clean and rate-extreme cases must independently retain detector-grade event performance.
The artifact case is gated separately so clean cases cannot hide detector failure under baseline wander and powerline interference.

truth_policy.event_scoreability: R-peak truth requires a complete in-record QRS and more than 5% retained signal during all-lead dropout; every exclusion is explicitly reported.
truth_policy.artifact_overlap: Baseline wander and powerline intervals remain scoreable and are separately visible in the artifact bin.
truth_policy.scope: Only R-peak event files are required. Absence of signal-quality, RR, HRV, classification or delineation output cannot make this evidence matrix incomplete.
truth_policy.boundary: QRS truth whose constructed support crosses the record boundary is excluded; no blanket edge window is used.

evidence_boundary: Synthetic engineering evidence for R-peak event detection only; not clinical validation, diagnostic performance evidence, regulatory qualification, or evidence for signal-quality or downstream interval/HRV functionality.
